name: frontend-design-discipline
description: Focused frontend review skills for composition, brand, copy, UI stability, and iterative refinement.

interface.shortDescription: Focused reviewer skills for frontend and UI quality
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles focused reviewer skills for frontend composition, brand signal, copy quality, UI stability, and iterative review-refine loops.
defaultPrompt: Review this UI for composition, hierarchy, and visual balance.
Audit whether this screen communicates the intended brand clearly.
Run a review-refine loop on this Figma frame until it passes.
